source_pr.title: tests: follow up to clean up go-check staff
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: tison <wander4096@gmail.com>

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #27874 

### Release note

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: The test was impacted by test-infrastructure migration follow-up work: removing remaining go-check artifacts and aligning the suite with standard Go testing + testify patterns. This PR stabilizes and cleans up the tests by removing deprecated go-check usage and fixing/testify-ifying related helper logic.
fix_pattern: Clean up remaining go-check artifacts and migrate assertions/helpers to testify to make the test suite behavior consistent and reliable.

evidence: files: tests/globalkilltest/global_kill_test.go, tests/globalkilltest/go.mod, tests/globalkilltest/go.sum, tests/globalkilltest/main_test.go, tests/graceshutdown/go.mod, tests/graceshutdown/go.sum, tests/graceshutdown/graceshutdown_test.go, tests/graceshutdown/main_test.go, tests/readonlytest/go.mod, tests/readonlytest/go.sum, tests/readonlytest/readonly_test.go
